title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates:
Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates!
